title: Francium Optimized
body:
### Francium Optimized - a great option for optimizing your Minecraft, including all OptiFine features and even more. 
The modpack includes many necessary features such as:
- Optimization
- All resource packs
- Custom menus
- Custom sky
- Custom lighting
- Connected textures
- All shaders
- Ears, tails, noses
- Capes
- Improved chat
- Dynamic lighting


#### You can customize this modpack to suit your needs or use it to create your own modpacks without my permission.

#### For all questions, I recommend you to visit my Discord server where you can get answers regarding my modpacks.

[Discord](https://discord.gg/cSsDcBHSeV)
